mof2text: C52H48N8O20Zn4 has unit-cell lengths of 11.002 Å, 11.002 Å, and 19.488 Å with cell angles of 73.3°, 106.7°, and 134.5°, and crystallizes in the C2/c space group. This interpenetrated 2d framework with the hcb topology. The partial atomic charge ranges for C, H, N, O, Zn are -0.44 to 0.62, 0.09 to 0.29, -0.24 to -0.12, -0.56 to -0.49, 0.88.
